X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
g1: R (pr12 xa1) 0
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 = pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1

      apply (intdomrcan X _ _ _ (pr2 aa0) e).
  
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inr l1)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (nc (pr12 xa2) 0 (pr22 xa2))) * pr1 (1,, is2) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (nc (pr12 xa2) 0 (pr22 xa2))) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inr l1)) * pr1 (1,, is2)
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
g2: R (pr12 xa2) 0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inr l1)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inl g2)) * pr1 (1,, is2) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inl g2)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inr l1)) * pr1 (1,, is2)
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inr l1)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inr l2)) * pr1 (1,, is2) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inr l2)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inr l1)) * pr1 (1,, is2)

    
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
g2: R (pr12 xa2) 0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inr l1)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inl g2)) * pr1 (1,, is2) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inl g2)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inr l1)) * pr1 (1,, is2)
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
g2: R (pr12 xa2) 0
- pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * 1 = pr1 xa2 * - pr12 xa1 * 1
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
g2: R (pr12 xa2) 0
- pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 = pr1 xa2 * - pr12 xa1 * 1
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
g2: R (pr12 xa2) 0
- pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 = pr1 xa2 * - pr12 xa1

      
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
g2: R (pr12 xa2) 0
- pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 = - (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1)
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
g2: R (pr12 xa2) 0
- (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2) = - (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1)

      
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
g2: R (pr12 xa2) 0
pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 = pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1

      apply (intdomrcan X _ _ _ (pr2 aa0) e).
    
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
      - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inr l1)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
         - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inr l2)) * pr1 (1,, is2) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa2) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa2) 0, pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa2),
      - pr1 xa2,, - pr12 xa2,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (inr l2)) *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa1) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa1) 0, pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa1),
         - pr1 xa1,, - pr12 xa1,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (inr l1)) * pr1 (1,, is2)
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
- pr1 xa1 * - pr12 xa2 * 1 =
- pr1 xa2 * - pr12 xa1 * 1
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
- pr1 xa1 * - pr12 xa2 = - pr1 xa2 * - pr12 xa1 * 1
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
- pr1 xa1 * - pr12 xa2 = - pr1 xa2 * - pr12 xa1

      
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
- (- pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2) = - pr1 xa2 * - pr12 xa1

R: hrel X

a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X

a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)

- - (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2) = - pr1 xa2 * - pr12 xa1

nc: neqchoice R

a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X

a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X

a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
- - (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2) = - (- pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1)
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
- - (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2) = - - (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1)

      
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
xa1, xa2: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
aa1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa1)
a1:= pr1 aa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
aa2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : X, intdomnonzerosubmonoid X) (pr1 xa2)
a2:= pr1 aa2: ringmultabmonoid X
t2: ∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
x1 * a2 * pr1 a0 = x2 * a1 * pr1 a0
aa0:= pr1 t2: λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))
a0:= pr1 aa0: pr1 X
e: x1 * a2 * a0 = x2 * a1 * a0
l1: R 0 (pr12 xa1)
l2: R 0 (pr12 xa2)
pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 = pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1

      apply (intdomrcan X _ _ _ (pr2 aa0) e).
Qed.

Definition weqfldfracgt_f (X : intdom) (is : isdeceq X) {R : hrel X} (is0 : @isbinophrel X R)
           (is1 : isringmultgt X R) (is2 : R 1 0) (nc : neqchoice R) :
  fldfrac X is → commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) :=
  setquotfun _ _ _ (weqfldfracgtintcomp_f X is0 is1 is2 nc).

Definition weqfldfracgtint_b (X : intdom) {R : hrel X} (is1 : isringmultgt X R) (is2 : R 1 0)
           (ir : isirrefl R) (xa : X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) :
  X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X :=
  pr1 xa ,, pr1 (pr2 xa) ,, rtoneq ir (pr2 (pr2 xa)).


X: intdom
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
iscomprelrelfun
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir)


X: intdom
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
iscomprelrelfun
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir)

  
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
iscomprelrelfun
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir)
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
eqrelcommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1
  xa2
→ eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)
    (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa1)
    (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa2)
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : λ x : pr1 X, R x 0,
   pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 a0 =
   pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 a0)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑
     a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
          make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
     pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 a0 =
     pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 a0)
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
(∑ a0 : λ x : pr1 X, R x 0,
 pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 a0 =
 pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 a0)
→ ∑
  a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
       make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
  pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 a0 =
  pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 a0
 
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
t2: ∑ a0 : λ x : pr1 X, R x 0,
pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 a0 =
pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 a0
∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 a0 =
pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 a0

  
X: intdom
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
t2: ∑ a0 : λ x : pr1 X, R x 0,
pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 a0 =
pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 a0
pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 *
pr1 (pr11 t2,, rtoneq ir (pr21 t2)) =
pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 *
pr1 (pr11 t2,, rtoneq ir (pr21 t2))

  apply (pr2 t2).
Defined.

Definition weqfldfracgt_b (X : intdom) (is : isdeceq X) {R : hrel X} (is1 : isringmultgt X R)
           (is2 : R 1 0) (ir : isirrefl R) :
  commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) → fldfrac X is :=
  setquotfun _ _ _ (weqfldfracgtintcomp_b X is1 is2 ir).


X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
fldfrac X is
≃ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)


X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
fldfrac X is
≃ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
fldfrac X is
≃ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
fldfrac X is
≃ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
fldfrac X is
≃ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
isweq f

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
∏ a : fldfrac X is, g (f a) = a
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
egf: ∏ a : fldfrac X is, g (f a) = a
isweq f

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
∏ a : fldfrac X is, g (f a) = a

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
∏
a : commringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X),,
    (λ e : 1%rig = 0%rig,
     nonzeroax X
       (zeroincommringfrac X
          (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)
          (λ a : intdomnonzerosubmonoid X, pr2 a) 1
          0%addmonoid e)),,
    (λ x : commringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X),
     coprod_rect
       (λ _ : (x = 0) ⨿ (x != 0),
        multinvpair
          (commringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
          x ⨿ (x = 0)) (λ e : x = 0, inr e)
       (λ ne : x != 0,
        inl
          (fldfracmultinv0 X is x,,
           islinvinfldfrac X is x ne,,
           isrinvinfldfrac X is x ne))
       (isdeceqfldfrac X is x 0)), g (f a) = a
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
∏
a : setquot
      (hrelabmonoidfrac (ringmultabmonoid X)
         (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)), g (f a) = a

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
∏ x : X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (g
        (f
           (setquotpr
              (eqrelcommringfrac X
                 (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) x)) =
      setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) x)
     (isasetsetquot
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
        (g
           (f
              (setquotpr
                 (eqrelcommringfrac X
                    (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) x)))
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) x)))

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (g
        (f
           (setquotpr
              (eqrelcommringfrac X
                 (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) xa)) =
      setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) xa)
     (isasetsetquot
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
        (g
           (f
              (setquotpr
                 (eqrelcommringfrac X
                    (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) xa)))
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) xa)))
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
g
  (f
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) xa)) =
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) xa

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir
     (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa)) =
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)) xa

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)
  (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir
     (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa)) xa
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
ishinh_UU
  (∑
   a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
        make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
   pr1 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa) *
   pr12 xa * pr1 a0 =
   pr1 xa *
   pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa) *
   pr1 a0)
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
∑
a0 : λ x : pr1 X,
     make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)),
pr1 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa) * pr12 xa *
pr1 a0 =
pr1 xa * pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa) *
pr1 a0

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
pr1 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa) * pr12 xa *
pr1 (1,, nonzeroax X) =
pr1 xa * pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa) *
pr1 (1,, nonzeroax X)
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
pr1 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa) * pr12 xa *
1 =
pr1 xa * pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc xa) *
1

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
xa: X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R (pr12 xa) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R (pr12 xa) 0, pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, g)
     (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa),
      - pr1 xa,, - pr12 xa,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (nc (pr12 xa) 0 (pr22 xa))) * pr12 xa * 1 =
pr1 xa *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R (pr12 xa) 0 ⨿ R 0 (pr12 xa),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R (pr12 xa) 0, pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, g)
        (λ l : R 0 (pr12 xa),
         - pr1 xa,, - pr12 xa,, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (nc (pr12 xa) 0 (pr22 xa))) * 1

        (inl g')) * 1

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

∏ x : X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (f
        (g
           (setquotpr
              (eqrelcommringfrac X
                 (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x)) =
      setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x)
     (isasetsetquot
        (eqrelcommringfrac X

        (f
           (g
              (setquotpr
                 (eqrelcommringfrac X
                    (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x)))
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x)))

is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0

→ fldfrac X is
egf: ∏ a : fldfrac X is, g (f a) = a
xa: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : λ x : pr1 X, R x 0,
   pr1
     (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc
        (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)) * pr12 xa *
   pr1 a0 =
   pr1 xa *
   pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc
           (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)) *
   pr1 a0)

is: isdeceq X

→ fldfrac X is
egf: ∏ a : fldfrac X is, g (f a) = a
xa: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
∑ a0 : λ x : pr1 X, R x 0,
pr1
  (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc
     (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)) * pr12 xa *
pr1 a0 =
pr1 xa *

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R

→ fldfrac X is
egf: ∏ a : fldfrac X is, g (f a) = a
xa: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1
  (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc
     (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)) * pr12 xa *
pr1 (1,, is2) =
pr1 xa *
pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc
        (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)) *
pr1 (1,, is2)

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
f:= weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc: fldfrac X is
→ commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
egf: ∏ a : fldfrac X is, g (f a) = a
xa: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R
              (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa))
              0
            ⨿ R 0
                (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir
                         xa)),
      X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (λ g : R
              (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa))
              0,
      pr1 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa),,
      pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa),, g)
     (λ l : R 0
              (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)),
      - pr1 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa),,
      - pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa),,
      ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (nc (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)) 0
        (pr22 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)))) *
pr12 xa * pr1 (1,, is2) =
pr1 xa *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R
                 (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir
                          xa)) 0
               ⨿ R 0
                   (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2
                            ir xa)),
         X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
        (λ g : R
                 (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir
                          xa)) 0,
         pr1 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa),,
         pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa),, g)
        (λ l : R 0
                 (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir
                          xa)),
         - pr1 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa),,
         - pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa),,
         ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (nc (pr12 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa))
           0
           (pr22 (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa)))) *
pr1 (1,, is2)
 
X: intdom

R: hrel X

→ fldfrac X is

xa: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : R
              (pr12 (pr1 xa,,
                     pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa))) 0
            ⨿ R 0
                (pr12 (pr1 xa,,

      g)

              (pr12 (pr1 xa,,

      - pr1 (pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa)),,
      - pr12 (pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa)),,
      ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
     (nc
        (pr12 (pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa)))
        0
        (pr22 (pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa))))) *
pr12 xa * pr1 (1,, is2) =
pr1 xa *
pr12 (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : R
                 (pr12 (pr1 xa,,
                        pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa)))
                 0
               ⨿ R 0
                   (pr12 (pr1 xa,,
                          pr12 xa,,

        (λ g : R

                 0,
         pr1 (pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa)),,
         pr12 (pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa)),,
         g)
        (λ l : R 0
                 (pr12 (pr1 xa,,

         -
         pr1 (pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa)),,
         -
         pr12 (pr1 xa,, pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa)),,
         ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
        (nc
           (pr12 (pr1 xa,,
                  pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa))) 0
           (pr22 (pr1 xa,,
                  pr12 xa,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa))))) *

           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x) +
      g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x')))

      
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
make_hProp
  (g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa1 +
      setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa2) =
   g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa1) +
   g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa2))
  (setproperty (fldfrac X is)
     (g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa1 +
         setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa2))
     (g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa1) +
      g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa2)))

      
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (g0
     (commringfracop1int X
        (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1 xa2)) =
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (commringfracop1int X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)
     (g0 xa1) (g0 xa2))

is: isdeceq X

→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X

g0
  (commringfracop1int X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     xa1 xa2) =
commringfracop1int X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)
  (g0 xa1) (g0 xa2)

      
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir
  (commringfracop1int X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     xa1 xa2) =
commringfracop1int X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)
  (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa1)
  (weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir xa2)
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1
  (commringfracop1int X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     xa1 xa2),,
pr12 (commringfracop1int X
        (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1 xa2),,
rtoneq ir
  (pr22 (commringfracop1int X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1 xa2)) =
commringfracop1int X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa1))
  (pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa2))
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1
  (pr12 xa2 * pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa1 * pr1 xa2,,
   (pr2 xa1 + pr2 xa2)%addmonoid),,
pr12 (pr12 xa2 * pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa1 * pr1 xa2,,
      (pr2 xa1 + pr2 xa2)%addmonoid),,
rtoneq ir
  (pr22 (pr12 xa2 * pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa1 * pr1 xa2,,
         (pr2 xa1 + pr2 xa2)%addmonoid)) =
pr12 (pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa2)) *
pr1 (pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa1)) +
pr12 (pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa1)) *
pr1 (pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa2)),,
(pr2 (pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa1)) +
 pr2 (pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa2)))%addmonoid
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr12 xa2 * pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa1 * pr1 xa2,,
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (pr2 xa1) *
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (pr2 xa2),,
rtoneq ir
  (is1 (pr12 xa1) (pr12 xa2) (pr22 xa1) (pr22 xa2)) =
pr12 xa2 * pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa1 * pr1 xa2,,
make_carrier
  (λ x : pr1 X,
   make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)))
  (pr12 xa1 * pr12 xa2)
  (λ e : pr12 xa1 * pr12 xa2 = 0,
   toneghdisj
     (rtoneq ir (pr22 xa1),, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa2))
     (intdomax X (pr12 xa1) (pr12 xa2) e))

pr12 xa2 * pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa1 * pr1 xa2 =
pr12 xa2 * pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa1 * pr1 xa2

x1: X

xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (pr2 (x1,, aa1)) *
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (pr2 xa2),,

  (is1 (pr12 (x1,, aa1)) (pr12 xa2) (pr22 (x1,, aa1))

   toneghdisj

pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) aa1 *
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) aa2,,
rtoneq ir
  (is1 (pr1 aa1) (pr1 aa2) (pr2 aa1) (pr2 aa2)) =
make_carrier
  (λ x : pr1 X,
   make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)))
  (pr1 aa1 * pr1 aa2)
  (λ e : pr1 aa1 * pr1 aa2 = 0,
   toneghdisj
     (rtoneq ir (pr2 aa1),, rtoneq ir (pr2 aa2))
     (intdomax X (pr1 aa1) (pr1 aa2) e))

→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1: X
a1: ringmultabmonoid X
ia1: ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 a1
x2: X
aa2: ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (a1,, ia1) *
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) aa2,,
rtoneq ir
  (is1 (pr1 (a1,, ia1)) (pr1 aa2) (pr2 (a1,, ia1))
     (pr2 aa2)) =
make_carrier
  (λ x : pr1 X,
   make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)))
  (pr1 (a1,, ia1) * pr1 aa2)
  (λ e : pr1 (a1,, ia1) * pr1 aa2 = 0,
   toneghdisj
     (rtoneq ir (pr2 (a1,, ia1)),, rtoneq ir (pr2 aa2))
     (intdomax X (pr1 (a1,, ia1)) (pr1 aa2) e))
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1: X
a1: ringmultabmonoid X
ia1: ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 a1
x2: X
a2: ringmultabmonoid X
ia2: ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 a2
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (a1,, ia1) *
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (a2,, ia2),,
rtoneq ir
  (is1 (pr1 (a1,, ia1)) (pr1 (a2,, ia2))
     (pr2 (a1,, ia1)) (pr2 (a2,, ia2))) =
make_carrier
  (λ x : pr1 X,
   make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)))
  (pr1 (a1,, ia1) * pr1 (a2,, ia2))
  (λ e : pr1 (a1,, ia1) * pr1 (a2,, ia2) = 0,
   toneghdisj
     (rtoneq ir (pr2 (a1,, ia1)),,
      rtoneq ir (pr2 (a2,, ia2)))
     (intdomax X (pr1 (a1,, ia1)) (pr1 (a2,, ia2)) e))
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
x1: X
a1: ringmultabmonoid X
ia1: ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 a1
x2: X
a2: ringmultabmonoid X
ia2: ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 a2
a1 * a2,, rtoneq ir (is1 a1 a2 ia1 ia2) =
make_carrier
  (λ x : pr1 X,
   make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))) (a1 * a2)
  (λ e : a1 * a2 = 0,
   toneghdisj (rtoneq ir ia1,, rtoneq ir ia2)
     (intdomax X a1 a2 e))

        apply (invmaponpathsincl
                 (@pr1 _ _) (isinclpr1 _ (λ a, (isapropneg (a = 0))))
                 (a1 * a2 ,, rtoneq ir (is1 a1 a2 ia1 ia2))
                 (make_carrier (λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x = 0 → empty) (isapropneg (x = 0)))
                              (a1 * a2) (λ (e : a1 * a2 = 0),
                                           toneghdisj (rtoneq ir ia1 ,, rtoneq ir ia2)
                                                      (intdomax X a1 a2 e))) (idpath _)).

is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
g 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid

→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (g0 (0,, 1,, is2)) =
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (0,, 1,, nonzeroax X)

→ fldfrac X is

→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
1,, rtoneq ir is2 = 1,, nonzeroax X

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
∏ x x' : X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2,
make_hProp
  (g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x *
      setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x') =
   g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x) *
   g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x'))
  (setproperty (fldfrac X is)
     (g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x *
         setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x'))
     (g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x) *
      g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) x')))

g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
make_hProp
  (g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa1 *
      setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa2) =
   g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa1) *
   g
     (setquotpr
        (eqrelcommringfrac X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa2))
  (setproperty (fldfrac X is)
     (g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa1 *
         setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa2))
     (g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa1) *
      g
        (setquotpr
           (eqrelcommringfrac X
              (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) xa2)))

  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))

     (commringfracop2int X
        (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1 xa2)) =

  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))

g0
  (commringfracop2int X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)

is: isdeceq X

g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)

→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1
  (commringfracop2int X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     xa1 xa2),,
pr12 (commringfracop2int X
        (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1 xa2),,
rtoneq ir
  (pr22 (commringfracop2int X
           (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1 xa2)) =
commringfracop2int X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa1))
  (pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa2))

pr1
  (abmonoidfracopint (ringmultabmonoid X)
     (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1 xa2),,
pr12 (abmonoidfracopint (ringmultabmonoid X)
        (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) xa1 xa2),,
rtoneq ir
  (pr22 (abmonoidfracopint (ringmultabmonoid X)

  (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X)

is: isdeceq X

is2: R 1 0

g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1 (xa1 + xa2)%addmonoid,,
pr12 (xa1 + xa2)%addmonoid,,
rtoneq ir (pr22 (xa1 + xa2)%addmonoid) =
((pr1 xa1,, pr12 xa1,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa1)) +
 (pr1 xa2,, pr12 xa2,, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa2)))%addmonoid

is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
xa1, xa2: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2,,
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (pr2 xa1) *
pr1carrier (λ x : pr1 X, R x 0) (pr2 xa2),,
rtoneq ir
  (is1 (pr12 xa1) (pr12 xa2) (pr22 xa1) (pr22 xa2)) =
pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2,,
make_carrier
  (λ x : pr1 X,
   make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0)))
  (pr12 xa1 * pr12 xa2)
  (λ e : pr12 xa1 * pr12 xa2 = 0,
   toneghdisj
     (rtoneq ir (pr22 xa1),, rtoneq ir (pr22 xa2))
     (intdomax X (pr12 xa1) (pr12 xa2) e))

x2: X
a2: ringmultabmonoid X
ia2: ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 a2
a1 * a2,, rtoneq ir (is1 a1 a2 ia1 ia2) =
make_carrier
  (λ x : pr1 X,
   make_hProp (x != 0) (isapropneg (x = 0))) (a1 * a2)
  (λ e : a1 * a2 = 0,
   toneghdisj (rtoneq ir ia1,, rtoneq ir ia2)
     (intdomax X a1 a2 e))

        apply (invmaponpathsincl
                 (@pr1 _ _)
                 (isinclpr1 _ (λ a, (isapropneg (a = 0))))
                 (a1 * a2 ,, rtoneq ir (is1 a1 a2 ia1 ia2))
                 (make_carrier (λ x : pr1 X, make_hProp (x = 0 → empty) (isapropneg (x = 0)))
                              (a1 * a2) (λ (e : a1 * a2 = 0),
                                           toneghdisj (rtoneq ir ia1 ,, rtoneq ir ia2)
                                                      (intdomax X a1 a2 e))) (idpath _)).
    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
g 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (g0 (1,, 1,, is2)) =
setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
  (1,, 1,, nonzeroax X)

      
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
g0 (1,, 1,, is2) = 1,, 1,, nonzeroax X

      
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
ir: isirrefl R
g:= weqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir: commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
→ fldfrac X is
g0:= weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir: X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2
→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
weqfldfracgtint_b X is1 is2 ir (1,, 1,, is2) =
1,, 1,, nonzeroax X

→ X × intdomnonzerosubmonoid X
pr1 (1,, 1,, is2),,
pr12 (1,, 1,, is2),, rtoneq ir (pr22 (1,, 1,, is2)) =
1,, 1,, nonzeroax X

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

X: intdom

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isringfun
  (setquotfun
     (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
     (eqrelcommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
     (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc)
     (weqfldfracgtintcomp_f X is0 is1 is2 nc))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
int:= make_ringiso
  (invweq (weqfldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc ir))
  (isringfunweqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir): ringiso (commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) (fldfrac X is)
isringfun
  (setquotfun
     (eqrelcommringfrac X (intdomnonzerosubmonoid X))
     (eqrelcommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
     (weqfldfracgtint_f X is0 is1 is2 nc)
     (weqfldfracgtintcomp_f X is0 is1 is2 nc))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
int:= make_ringiso
  (invweq (weqfldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc ir))
  (isringfunweqfldfracgt_b X is is1 is2 ir): ringiso (commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)) (fldfrac X is)
isringfun (invmap int)

  apply isringfuninvmap.
Qed.


(** **** Definition and properties of "greater" on the field of fractions *)

Definition fldfracgt (X : intdom) (is : isdeceq X) {R : hrel X} (is0 : @isbinophrel X R)
           (is1 : isringmultgt X R) (is2 : R 1 0) (nc : neqchoice R) : hrel (fldfrac X is) :=
  λ a b, commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1 (λ c r, r)
                        (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
                        (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b).


X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isringmultgt (fldfrac X is)
  (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)


X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isringmultgt (fldfrac X is)
  (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

  
X: intdom

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

  (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isringmultgt
  (commringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
     is1
     (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))

  apply isringmultcommringfracgt.
Qed.

isbinophrel
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
     is1
     (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))

  apply isringaddcommringfracgt.

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
isr: istrans R
a, b, c: fldfrac X is
fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc a b
→ fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc b c
  → fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc a c
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
isr: istrans R
a, b, c: fldfrac X is
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b)
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
    is1
    (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc c)
  → commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
      is1
      (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
      (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
      (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc c)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
isr: istrans R
a, b, c: fldfrac X is
istrans R

  apply isr.
Qed.

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
isr: isasymm R
a, b: fldfrac X is
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b)
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
    is1
    (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a) → ∅

  apply isr.
Qed.

X: intdom

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

nc: neqchoice R

→ fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc a b
  ∨ fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc b c
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
isr: iscotrans R
a, b, c: fldfrac X is
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc c)
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
    is1
    (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b)
  ∨ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
      is1
      (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
      (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b)
      (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc c)

is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
isr: iscotrans R
a, b, c: fldfrac X is
iscotrans R

  apply isr.
Qed.

isantisymmneg (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0

is: isdeceq X

is0: isbinophrel R

int: isantisymmneg
(commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
isantisymmneg (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isr: isantisymmneg R
isantisymmneg
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
     is1
     (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isr: isantisymmneg R
isantisymmneg
  (abmonoidfracrel (ringmultabmonoid X)
     (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     (ispartbinopcommringfracgt X
        (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
        (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c),
         r)))

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isr: isantisymmneg R
isantisymmneg R

    apply isr.
  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isr: isantisymmneg R
int: isantisymmneg
(commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
isantisymmneg (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isr: isantisymmneg R
int: isantisymmneg
(commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
a, b: fldfrac X is
n1: ¬ fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc a b
n2: ¬ fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc b a
a = b
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
ir: isirrefl R
isr: isantisymmneg R
int: isantisymmneg
(commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
a, b: fldfrac X is
n1: ¬ fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc a b
n2: ¬ fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc b a
e:= int (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b) n1 n2: weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a =
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b
a = b

  apply (invmaponpathsweq (weqfldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc ir)  _ _ e).
Qed.


X: intdom

R: hrel X

is2: R 1 0
nc: neqchoice R
isa: isasymm R
isr: isdecrel R
isdecrel (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

is2: R 1 0

isdecrel
  (λ a b : fldfrac X is,
   commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
     is1
     (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
     (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
     (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b))
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1 0

isr: isdecrel R
a, b: fldfrac X is
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b)
⨿ ¬ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
      is1
      (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
      (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
      (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b)

(** **** Relations and the canonical homomorphism to the field of fractions *)



X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
iscomprelrelfun L (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)
  (tofldfrac X is)

  (tofldfrac X is)

x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc (tofldfrac X is x1)
  (tofldfrac X is x2)

L: hrel X

is2: L 1 0

l: L x1 x2

(commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc (tofldfrac X is x1)
  (tofldfrac X is x2)

is2: L 1 0

l: L x1 x2

(commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r))
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc (tofldfrac X is x1)
  (tofldfrac X is x2)

(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r))
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x1))
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x2))
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x1))
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x2))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
∏ x : X,
tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x =
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (tofldfrac X is x)

  (tofldfrac X is x)

(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)

setquotpr
  (eqrelcommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2))
  (x,, 1,, is2) =

→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
x: X
x,, 1,, is2 =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : L (pr12 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X)) 0
         ⨿ L 0 (pr12 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X)),
   X × ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
  (λ g : L (pr12 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X)) 0,
   pr1 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X),,
   pr12 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X),, g)
  (λ l : L 0 (pr12 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X)),
   - pr1 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X),,
   - pr12 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X),, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
  (nc (pr12 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X)) 0
     (pr22 (x,, 1,, nonzeroax X)))
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
x: X
x,, 1,, is2 =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : L 1 0 ⨿ L 0 1, pr1 X × (λ x : pr1 X, L x 0))
  (λ g : L 1 0, x,, 1,, g)
  (λ l : L 0 1, - x,, - (1),, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
  (nc 1 0 (nonzeroax X))

  (λ g : L 1 0, x,, 1,, g)
  (λ l : L 0 1, - x,, - (1),, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
x: X
l': L 1 0
x = x
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
x: X
l': L 1 0
1,, is2 = 1,, l'

      
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
x: X
l': L 1 0
x = x
 apply idpath.
      
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)

l': L 1 0
1,, is2 = 1,, l'
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
x: X
l': L 1 0
pr1 (1,, is2) = pr1 (1,, l')

        apply idpath.
    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
x: X
nl: L 0 1
x,, 1,, is2 =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : L 1 0 ⨿ L 0 1, pr1 X × (λ x : pr1 X, L x 0))
  (λ g : L 1 0, x,, 1,, g)
  (λ l : L 0 1, - x,, - (1),, ringfromlt0 X is0 l)
  (inr nl)
 induction (isa _ _ is2 nl).
  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
ee: ∏ x : X,
tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x =
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (tofldfrac X is x)
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x1))
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x2))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
(λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
(tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
ee: ∏ x : X,
tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x =
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (tofldfrac X is x)
int': L x1 x2
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
    is0 is1 (λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x1)
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x2)
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x1))
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x2))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
    is0 is1 (λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
ee: ∏ x : X,
tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x =
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (tofldfrac X is x)
int': L x1 x2
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
    is0 is1 (λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
       (tofldfrac X is x1))
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x2)
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x1))
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x2))
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
    is0 is1 (λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
ee: ∏ x : X,
tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x =
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (tofldfrac X is x)
int': L x1 x2
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
    is0 is1 (λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
       (tofldfrac X is x1))
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
       (tofldfrac X is x2))
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x1))
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
     (tofldfrac X is x2))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: L 1 0
nc: neqchoice L
isa: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
l: L x1 x2
int: ∏ x x' : pr1 X,
L x x'
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
    is0 is1 (λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x)
    (tocommringfrac X
       (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x')
ee: ∏ x : X,
tocommringfrac X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) x =
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (tofldfrac X is x)
int': L x1 x2
→ commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
    is0 is1 (λ (c : pr1 X) (r : L c 0), r)
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
       (tofldfrac X is x1))
    (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
       (tofldfrac X is x2))
L x1 x2
 apply l.
Qed.
